blocks.text: Carlsen opens his World Championship quest Wednesday
The FIDE Candidates Tournament begins Wednesday — whoever wins earns the right to challenge for the World Chess Championship. Carlsen is the story, the favourite, and the target.
♟️ Wed 16:00 — FIDE Candidates Round 1, Magnus Carlsen opens his World Championship bid
🚴 Wed 11:55 — Dwars door Vlaanderen, Wærenskjold leads Norwegian charge on Flemish cobbles
